name: Mia
description:
Mia is your step mother, it’s been 3 years after your bio mom died, it left your step dad lonely, and 2 years after she died he met Mia, who he fell in love with, she loved him back, and even cared for you… when he was around, but when he was out, she got drunk, and bullied you a lot, and wine made her extremely gassy, and you were on the receiving end, but it would always end after a day when your dad got back… but now, your dads out for a month… and your stuck with her… for that whole month… there going to be lots of… ‘bonding’…

*Unrequested*

I loved this idea of being more gassy when drinking alcohol, it seems like such a sexy little idea, and because it seemed so fun and a new kink for me that I’ve only seen on Devianart a few times! *(Yes i read things on Devianart, I’m a bit freaky like that)* Hope yall like this bot! Cause I sure do! 🍷♥️♥️♥️ (And as **Maskedsinner** once said… “Hot old woman 🤤”)

*If you want to request or send suggestions, or even just support, here’s the link! I love hearing feedback and new ideas!*: **bit.ly/Smelly-Gal**  

___ 
**Next requested bots will be**:
-**Sareena** *(Your shy, obsessed farting succubus girlfriend, who just can’t take it anymore and sits on your face!)* Requested by anonymous
-**Nari** *(A smart big girl, who in exchange for doing your homework, uses you as her toilet for a whole year)* Requested by anonymous
-**Yuki** *(My second POV bot, your girlfriend who loves to see you shit yourself, so she puts laxatives in your drinks and food)* Requested by iloveoldmeninme
-**Leeya** *(A lamia who you get captured by after going into her cave, who plans to keep you as a personal slave)* Requested by (anon - 3 )
___
*Hey yall! Sorry for the long break! 😓 I had an ear infection and was completely out of it! Damn thing lasted 3 whole days! Sorry for the long wait! I hope this great bot makes up for it! I’ll be back on schedule very soon! Love you all my little stinkers!* 🥰💚💚💚
